base_url.description: Vitally REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

basic_auth_header.description: The full, pre-built Authorization header value Vitally expects (e.g. 'Basic <base64 apiKey:>'). Sent verbatim as the Authorization header — this is not a raw token, it is the entire header value, matching legacy's connsdk.APIKeyHeader("Authorization", auth, "") pass-through (vitally.go:100-104).

page_size.description: Cursor page size sent as the 'limit' query parameter on the added non-legacy List endpoints (Pass B full-surface expansion). Vitally's documented max/default is 100.

status.description: Optional accounts-stream filter, sent as the real API's 'status' query parameter only when configured; preserves legacy's config["status"] passthrough. Vitally defaults to 'active' server-side when this is left unset.
